title: Soviet Ufology / SETKA
description: Historical research on Soviet anomalous-phenomena programs, SETKA, military concerns, secrecy, and post-Soviet ufology.

qas.question: What was the actual role of Soviet/post-Soviet ufology organizations?
qas.answer: SETKA-related programs and Soviet anomalous-phenomena study are historically important, but extraterrestrial conclusions, recovered craft, bodies, or superweapon claims remain unverified unless stronger primary documentation is found.

qas.question: How did UFO mythology evolve from folklore into modern technological-abduction narratives?
qas.answer: SETKA-related programs and Soviet anomalous-phenomena study are historically important, but extraterrestrial conclusions, recovered craft, bodies, or superweapon claims remain unverified unless stronger primary documentation is found.
